notes: Daily Zuhr Jama'at: 1:00pm. Fajr Jama'at is 15 minutes after Fajr start. Maghrib Jama'at is 10 minutes after Azan. English Sermons will start 30 minutes before Salah. Ramadan Daily Programme: Weekdays Mon-Fri: After Fajr - One Hadith 5-minute session Translation & Practical Lessons; After Zuhr - Ta'lim (in Urdu); After Asar - Darsul Qur'an Surah Yusuf; After Tarawih - Short Reminders. Saturday: After Zuhr - Darsul Qur'an Surah Al Fatihah; After Asar - English Talk. Sunday: After Zuhr - Darsul Hadith Riyadus Salihin; After Asar - Darsul Qur'an Surah Yusuf. Note: The programmes after Fajr and Tarawih will continue as normal on the weekend.
eid_salah: 7:30am & 9:00am. English sermons will start 30 mins before salah
